sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Honpa’ itna thu ka za hi,
Itna lamdang hi mah hi ding hi;
Van pan kei ading hong kumsuk maw?
Van pan kei ading hong kumsuk

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hi, hi, hi, kei ading hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sing tungah gimna thuakin hong si;
Mun khempeuh ah hih thu kithei,
Hong khasiat man kei ading thuak hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh a umte’n mu ding uh hi;
Bawl kholhsa-in a om hiam, innpi?

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa kong dotna hong dawng in,
kiang lo kua kiang pai ding ka hiam?
Kha Siangtho kei hong hilhsak in,
Honpa le vantung om, ci’n nong ciam.
